name: @platform/tooling-terraform
description: Terraform workflow tooling: module patterns, provider version locks, and workspace management scripts.

readme.summary: Terraform workflow tooling: module patterns, provider version locks, and workspace management scripts.
responsibilities: Define reusable Terraform module patterns for the platform's infrastructure primitives
Maintain provider version locks across all Terraform configurations
Provide workspace management scripts for environment-specific state isolation
Enforce Terraform formatting and validation in pre-commit and CI
nonResponsibilities: Does not define the AWS resource topology (owned by infra-aws)
Does not manage Terraform Cloud or remote state backend configuration
Does not own secrets or credential management for Terraform runs
usage: Terraform modules defined here are consumed by infra-aws configurations
Workflow scripts are invoked by tooling-ci as part of the infrastructure apply pipeline
operationalNotes: Provider version locks must be updated deliberately — patch without review is not allowed
All Terraform modules must pass tflint and tfsec before merge
